titleStmt.title: SII 17.588: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 588. (A.R. No. 543 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple, right of entrance.
This inscription is dated in the 19th day of the 5th year of Tribhuvanachakravartin Rājādhirājadēva, evidently identical with Rājādhirāja II on account of the mention of an order of Vikrama-chōḷa.

This records an order of the king, restoring to the servants of the temple of Śrīmūlasthānamuḍaiyār, house-sites previously made tax-free and set apart for them after making allotments to the cheṭṭis, chekkārs, their followers and Chōḷēndiraśiṅgaṉ vēḷaikkāṟar in the 9th year of Vikramachōḷa. The sites are stated to have been later on encroached upon by the cheṭṭis for their dwellings and shops. It is also stated that the servants of the temple were to receive 100 kāśu in compensation.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājādhirājadevarkku yāṇṭu Aintāvatu nāḷ pattoṉpatiṉāl prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi tribhuvanaccakravartti ko
neriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ tiruvārur Uṭaiyār śrīmūlasthānamuṭaiyār koyilil patipātamulap paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyat tevarkaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārka
ḷukkum śrīkāriyañ ceyvāṉukkum tiruvārur nakarattu Iṟaiyili nattattile Ivvūrc ceṭṭi kaḷukku nūṟṟumuppatu maṉaiyum cekkārkkum Ivarkaḷ Anusārat
tuḷḷārkkum Irupatu maṉaiyuñ coḷentiraciṅkaṉ veḷaikkāṟarkku Aimpatu maṉaiyuṅ kuṭiyirup pākavum nikkiniṉṟa nattam Uṭaiyār śrīmūlasthānamuṭaiyārkkut
tirumaṭaiviḷākamāy nivantakkāṟarkkuk kuṭiyiruppākavuṅ kaṭavatāka vikkiramacoḻatevarkku Oṉpatāvatu nāḷile Olai ceṉṟu Ippaṭiye cilanāḷ Aṉupavittu varacce
yte nivantakkāṟarkkuk kuṭi Iruppāṉa maṉaikaḷaiyuñ ceṭṭikaḷe kaikkoṇṭārkaḷeṉṟum Ivvūr Iṟaiyilinattattut tiruvārur nakarattuc ceṭṭikaḷukku Ivarkaḷ kuṭiyiruppāṉa teṟkiṟ puṟattiruvi
tiyum Itaṉ teṟku Ivarkaḷum Ivarkaḷ Anusārattuḷḷāruṅ kuṭiyiruntu kaṭai kaṭṭip parimāṟi varukiṟa Avaṉinārāyaṇap perunateruviṟ cekkār Oḻukkaikku meṟkum Akap piṇavar teruvuk
ku vaṭakkum kuṭiyiruppākavum cekkārkku Avaṉinārāyaṇap perunteruviṟ cekkār Oḻukkai yeṉkiṟa Itukkuk kiḻakkuk kuṭiyiruppākavum coḷentiraciṅkaṉveḷaikkāṟarkkut te
ṟkiṟpuṟattiruvitikku vaṭakku Aimpatu maṉai kuṭiyiruppākavum nīkki niṉṟa muṭaiyārkkut tirumaṭaiviḷākamāy nivantakkāṟar pala Iṭaṅkaḷiluṅ kuṭi Irukkiṟār tiru
vitiyile cera maṉai yeṭuttu Irukkavum tiruvārur nakarattukku ṭu varukiṟa kācile tirumaṭai viḷākamāy nivantakkāṟark kuṭiyiruppāṉa nattattukku nū
ṟu kācu nālāvatu mutal tavirntu nikki niṉṟa kācu Innakarattukku ḷavum Ippaṭikkuk koyilile kalveṭṭavum peṟaveṇumeṉṟu pallavarājaṉ namakkuc co
ṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatākac collik kaṇakkilum Iṭṭu kaḷukkuc coṉṉom tiruvārur Iṟaiyili nattattiṟ teṟkiṟ puṟattiruvitiyu Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.588 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
